title: PC1 RTX 4090 Qwen3.6-35B-A3B DFlash / buun llama.cpp validation
purpose: Continuously evaluate Qwen3.6 GGUF quality and speed on PC1 RTX 4090, prioritizing buun-llama-cpp/DFlash-like acceleration only when quality stays clean.

model.quality_floor: UD-Q4_K_M unless VRAM/runtime forces lower; do not productize sub-Q4 results without explicit quality win.

candidate.notes: Use local buun/llama-server build if present; script is env-configurable because PC1 paths may differ.

gates.quality: All quality prompts pass. JSON parses. Code compiles. No markdown fences when forbidden. No corruption, replacement chars, broken imports/routes/braces, repeated nonsense, or early cutoff.
gates.speed: Candidate median completion tok/s >= 1.3x baseline for research continuation; >=1.5x for BenchLoop-ready win; >=2.0x strong win.
gates.reliability: No CUDA OOM, server crash, request timeout, non-2xx response, or hard-fail hit across full cycle.
gates.benchloop_ready: quality_pass=true AND reliability_pass=true AND speedup_vs_baseline>=1.5 AND at least 3 consecutive clean cycles.

decision_rule: Quality is the kill switch. Fast corrupted output is failure, not progress.
